use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF UNRESECTABLE OR METASTATIC GASTROINTESTINAL STROMAL TUMOR (GIST) HARBORING A PLATELET-DERIVED GROWTH FACTOR RECEPTOR ALPHA (PDGFRA) EXON 18 MUTATION
